title: Spain Foreigner Identity Card Application (TIE, EX-17)
description: The Dirección General de la Policía (DGP, Spain's national police directorate, part of the Ministerio del Interior)'s EX-17 form, 'Solicitud de Tarjeta de Identidad de Extranjero (TIE)' — the application a foreign national authorized to reside in Spain files, in person, to obtain the physical Tarjeta de Identidad de Extranjero: the credential that documents a foreigner's legal residence status. The single form covers three request types (initial card issuance, renewal, and duplicate for theft/loss/destruction/unusability), selected via the form's own art. 210-referenced checkbox group. Models the applicant's own identification, filiation, and domicile data; an optional distinct-submitter block for when someone other than the applicant physically presents the request (a representative or, for a minor/incapacitated applicant, a legal guardian); an optional notification-address block, including the applicant's opt-in consent to receive notifications via Spain's Dirección Electrónica Habilitada Única (Dehú) electronic notification system; the filing office the request is addressed to; the requested document-type selection; and the closing place/date/signature. Also models the Tasa 790 Código 012 fee-payment proof the DGP's own live procedure page names as a required accompanying document (the fee amount itself is not modelled — see VERIFICATION.md). The form is a static print/hand-fill PDF with no AcroForm fields, fully self-documenting via its own page-3 numbered instructions key. Deliberately does not model: the form's own printed 'Nombre y apellidos del titular' running-header caption on page 2 (a repeat of the applicant's own name already captured in Section 1, not a distinct field); any online/telematic submission channel (the form's own header states in-person presentation before the competent Policía Nacional unit is the only accepted channel — telematic or public-registry submission is explicitly not admitted); and the fee amount itself (fee schedules change and were not confirmed from a primary government source this cycle — see VERIFICATION.md). This closes Spain's National ID & Civic Documents gap, its 4th of 6 verticals. GovSchema is independent and is not affiliated with, endorsed by, or operated by the Government of Spain or the Dirección General de la Policía.

source.documentRef: EX-17 (edición '03'), Solicitud de Tarjeta de Identidad de Extranjero (TIE) — Ministerio de Inclusión, Seguridad Social y Migraciones' downloadable PDF, a static print/hand-fill template with no AcroForm fields (confirmed nil widget annotations, same shape as pl/mf/zeznanie-pit-37 and ee/emta/income-tax-return-form-a), fully self-documenting via its own page-3 numbered instructions key. The live inclusion.gob.es domain is WAF-blocked to direct fetch from this environment; retrieved via a Wayback Machine snapshot returning the real PDF (HTTP 200, %PDF-1.7) — see verification.notes.

verification.notes: GOV-1735: GovSchema Standard Research cycle, following up on CATALOG.md's own flagged lead (the EX-15 foreigner-identity-number form) for Spain's open National ID & Civic Documents gap. EX-17 (TIE, Tarjeta de Identidad de Extranjero) was judged the closer fit: EX-15 only assigns a tax/ID number (NIE), while EX-17 is the application for the physical foreign-resident ID card itself, a closer parallel to already-published national-ID schemas like ae/icp/emirates-id-replacement and kr/mois/resident-registration-card-reissuance. inclusion.gob.es (the form's hosting domain) is WAF-blocked to direct fetch from this environment (returns an HTML firewall block page, not the PDF); retrieved instead via a Wayback Machine snapshot (http://web.archive.org/web/20260414195507if_/https://www.inclusion.gob.es/documents/410169/2156469/17-Formulario_TIE.pdf), confirmed HTTP 200 with real %PDF-1.7 bytes. The form's own text layer (extracted via pdfjs-dist, 3 pages) is fully self-documenting: page 3 is a numbered instructions key explaining every checkbox/footnote marker. Corroborated with a second, live source fetched directly with no WAF issue: the Policía Nacional's own official procedure page (sede.policia.gob.es, 'Tarjeta inicial o renovación residencia o residencia y trabajo', procedure code 994694), which confirms the purpose ('Documento destinado a identificar al extranjero a los efectos de acreditar su situación legal en España'), the in-person-only filing channel at any Oficina de Extranjería or Comisaría de Policía, the required Tasa 790 Código 012 fee-payment-proof document, and the issuing/competent authority (Dirección General de la Policía). IMPORTANT DISCLOSED DISCREPANCY: the live procedure page cites Real Decreto 1155/2024, de 19 de noviembre (which replaced RD 557/2011's implementing regulation) alongside LO 4/2000 as the current governing rules, but the PDF form itself still prints the older '(LO 4/2000 y RD 557/2011)' citation in its own header — the form has apparently not been reprinted since the 2024 regulation renumbering. This document's title/description cite the form's own printed legal basis verbatim (matching the source PDF), but flags RD 1155/2024 as the current governing implementing regulation per the live procedure page; the form's substantive field set is not affected by the renumbering. A publicly reported fee figure (~EUR 16.08 for the initial TIE as of 2026) was found via non-government secondary sources and is deliberately NOT modelled as an authoritative field value (fees change and this figure was not confirmed from a primary government source this cycle); only the fee-payment-proof document requirement itself (Tasa 790 Código 012) is modelled, per the live procedure page's own explicit documentation requirement. See VERIFICATION.md for the full field inventory, both sources, and every other disclosed judgment call (the sex-marker 'X' footnote's own country-of-origin-recognition nuance; the representative/notification-address blocks' conditional applicability; the in-person-only filing constraint).

fields.name: identifierType
fields.label: PASAPORTE / N.I.E.
fields.description: Which of the two identifier types the applicant is providing in `identifierNumber`: their passport number, or an already-assigned Número de Identidad de Extranjero (NIE). The form prints a checkbox choosing which applies.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: identifierNumber
fields.label: Nº Pasaporte / N.I.E.
fields.description: The passport number or NIE identified by `identifierType`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: firstSurname
fields.label: 1er Apellido
fields.description: The applicant's first (paternal) surname.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: secondSurname
fields.label: 2º Apellido
fields.description: The applicant's second (maternal) surname, when one applies. Not every naming convention carries a second surname, and the form marks no asterisk making it mandatory.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: givenName
fields.label: Nombre
fields.description: The applicant's given name(s).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: sex
fields.label: Sexo
fields.description: The applicant's sex, as printed on the form: H (Hombre/male), M (Mujer/female), or X (Indefinido/unspecified). Per the form's own footnote (1), the X/unspecified box may only be checked by a person who has this marker officially recognized in their own country of origin — it is not a free general-purpose 'prefer not to say' option.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A; p.3 footnote (1)

fields.name: dateOfBirth
fields.label: Fecha de nacimiento
fields.description: The applicant's date of birth. The form itself splits this into separate day/month/year boxes (footnote (2) instructs dd/mm/aaaa order); modelled here as one ISO 8601 date, consistent with this registry's convention elsewhere.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A; p.3 footnote (2)

fields.name: placeOfBirth
fields.label: Lugar
fields.description: The applicant's place of birth.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: countryOfBirth
fields.label: País
fields.description: The applicant's country of birth.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: nationality
fields.label: Nacionalidad
fields.description: The applicant's current nationality.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: civilStatus
fields.label: Estado civil
fields.description: The applicant's civil status, per the form's own five-way checkbox: S (Soltero/a, single), C (Casado/a, married), V (Viudo/a, widowed), D (Divorciado/a, divorced), or Sep (Separado/a, separated).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A; p.3 footnote (3)

fields.name: fatherName
fields.label: Nombre del padre
fields.description: Full name of the applicant's father.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: motherName
fields.label: Nombre de la madre
fields.description: Full name of the applicant's mother.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialAddress
fields.label: Domicilio en España
fields.description: The applicant's residential address (street) in Spain.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialAddressNumber
fields.label: Nº
fields.description: Street number of the applicant's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialAddressFloor
fields.label: Piso
fields.description: Floor/unit of the applicant's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialLocality
fields.label: Localidad
fields.description: Town/city of the applicant's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialPostalCode
fields.label: C.P.
fields.description: Postal code of the applicant's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: residentialProvince
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the applicant's residential address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: applicantMobilePhone
fields.label: Teléfono móvil
fields.description: The applicant's mobile phone number. Not marked mandatory on the form.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: applicantEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: The applicant's e-mail address. Not marked mandatory on the form.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: applicantLegalRepresentativeId
fields.label: Representante legal, en su caso: DNI/NIE/PAS
fields.description: DNI/NIE/passport number of the applicant's own legal representative, filled in only when applicable (e.g. a parent/guardian representing a minor or an incapacitated applicant) — the form's own heading reads 'en su caso' ('if applicable').
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A

fields.name: applicantLegalRepresentativeTitle
fields.label: Título
fields.description: The basis on which the person named in `applicantLegalRepresentativeId` represents the applicant, e.g. 'Padre/Madre del menor' or 'Tutor' (guardian), per the form's own footnote (4) examples.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §1 DATOS DEL EXTRANJERO/A; p.3 footnote (4)

fields.name: submitterName
fields.label: Nombre/Razón Social
fields.description: Full name or business name of the person or entity physically presenting this request, when that person is not the applicant. The form's own section heading states this section 2 is filled in 'sólo en el caso de ser persona distinta del solicitante' (only when the submitter is a person distinct from the applicant), per footnote (5).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD; p.3 footnote (5)

fields.name: submitterId
fields.label: DNI/NIE/PAS
fields.description: DNI/NIE/passport number of the submitter named in `submitterName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterAddress
fields.label: Domicilio en España
fields.description: Residential/business address in Spain of the submitter named in `submitterName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterAddressNumber
fields.label: Nº
fields.description: Street number of the submitter's address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterAddressFloor
fields.label: Piso
fields.description: Floor/unit of the submitter's address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterLocality
fields.label: Localidad
fields.description: Town/city of the submitter's address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterPostalCode
fields.label: C.P.
fields.description: Postal code of the submitter's address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterProvince
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the submitter's address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterMobilePhone
fields.label: Teléfono móvil
fields.description: Mobile phone number of the submitter named in `submitterName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: E-mail address of the submitter named in `submitterName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterLegalRepresentativeId
fields.label: Representante legal, en su caso: DNI/NIE/PAS
fields.description: DNI/NIE/passport number of the submitter's own legal representative, filled in only when applicable (e.g. the submitter is a legal entity or an incapacitated person represented by a guardian).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD

fields.name: submitterLegalRepresentativeTitle
fields.label: Título
fields.description: The basis on which the person named in `submitterLegalRepresentativeId` represents the submitter, per footnote (4)'s examples (e.g. 'Padre/Madre del menor', 'Tutor').
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §2 DATOS DEL REPRESENTANTE A EFECTOS DE PRESENTACIÓN DE LA SOLICITUD; p.3 footnote (4)

fields.name: notificationRecipientName
fields.label: Nombre/Razón Social
fields.description: Full name or business name of the person or entity notifications/communications about this request should be sent to, when different from the applicant's own domicile in Section 1. Unlike Section 2, the form carries no explicit 'only if different' footnote for this section, so this schema treats every field here as optional, following that section's own analogous conditional shape (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationRecipientId
fields.label: DNI/NIE/PAS
fields.description: DNI/NIE/passport number of the notification recipient named in `notificationRecipientName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationAddress
fields.label: Domicilio en España
fields.description: The address notifications about this request should be sent to.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationAddressNumber
fields.label: Nº
fields.description: Street number of the notification address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationAddressFloor
fields.label: Piso
fields.description: Floor/unit of the notification address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationLocality
fields.label: Localidad
fields.description: Town/city of the notification address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationPostalCode
fields.label: C.P.
fields.description: Postal code of the notification address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationProvince
fields.label: Provincia
fields.description: Province of the notification address.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationMobilePhone
fields.label: Teléfono móvil
fields.description: Mobile phone number for notification purposes.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: notificationEmail
fields.label: E-mail
fields.description: E-mail address for notification purposes.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES

fields.name: electronicNotificationConsent
fields.label: CONSIENTO que las comunicaciones y notificaciones se realicen mediante puesta a disposición en la Dirección electrónica habilitada Única (Dehú)
fields.description: Opt-in consent for the applicant to receive communications and notifications about this request via Spain's Dirección Electrónica Habilitada Única (Dehú) single electronic-notification address, which requires a valid electronic certificate or Cl@ve system. Per footnote (6), certain categories of persons are instead obligated to electronic notification under Additional Provision 4 of RD 557/2011 regardless of this checkbox; this schema models only the checkbox itself, not the obligated-subject determination.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.1, §3 DOMICILIO A EFECTOS DE NOTIFICACIONES; p.3 footnote (6)

fields.name: filingOfficeName
fields.label: DIRIGIDA A
fields.description: The name of the Oficina de Extranjería or Comisaría de Policía competent unit this request is addressed to.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, header row

fields.name: filingOfficeDir3Code
fields.label: Código DIR3
fields.description: The DIR3 directory code (Spain's common public-sector unit directory) identifying the specific administrative unit named in `filingOfficeName`. Left optional: it is not confirmed from this source whether this box is filled in by the applicant or pre-printed/completed by DGP staff, since the form gives no further instruction for it (see VERIFICATION.md).
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, header row

fields.name: filingOfficeProvince
fields.label: PROVINCIA
fields.description: Province of the filing office named in `filingOfficeName`.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, header row

fields.name: documentRequestType
fields.label: 4.1. TIPO DE DOCUMENTO (art. 210)
fields.description: Which of the three request types this application is: issuance of a new/initial card, renewal of an existing card, or a duplicate because the existing card was stolen, lost, destroyed, or rendered unusable.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, §4.1 TIPO DE DOCUMENTO (art. 210)

fields.name: applicationPlace
fields.label: ……., a ….. de ……. de …….
fields.description: The place (town/city) where the application is signed, printed on the same line as the date ahead of the signature.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, closing signature line

fields.name: applicationDate
fields.label: ……., a ….. de ……. de …….
fields.description: The date the application is signed. The form itself spells this out in day/month(-name)/year prose form; modelled here as one ISO 8601 date, consistent with this registry's convention elsewhere.
fields.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, closing signature line

documents.label: Justificante de pago Tasa modelo 790 Código 012
documents.sourceRef: Policía Nacional official procedure page (sede.policia.gob.es), 'Tarjeta inicial o renovación residencia o residencia y trabajo', required documentation list. The fee amount itself is not modelled here — see VERIFICATION.md.

documents.label: Firma del solicitante (o representante legal, en su caso)
documents.sourceRef: EX-17 p.2, closing signature line 'FIRMA DEL SOLICITANTE (o representante legal, en su caso)'

steps.title: Datos del representante a efectos de presentación de la solicitud (si procede)
Oficina a la que se dirige la solicitud
